name: Phase 2: Validate app_ui.py on save
description: When app_ui.py is saved, audit SSE routes, queue management, stop flag, and physics constant imports.

action.message:
app_ui.py was just saved in phase-2-strands-robots-deepracer. Please audit:

1. SSE QUEUE DRAIN — confirm /execute drains _sse_queue before starting a new execution (while not empty loop with get_nowait).
2. STOP FLAG — confirm /execute calls _stop_flag.clear() before spawning thread, and /stop calls _stop_flag.set().
3. is_error() NOT USED — confirm app_ui.py does NOT import or call is_error(). The ok field must be computed as: `ok = not (message.lower().startswith('error') or is_emergency)`.
4. PHYSICS IMPORTS — confirm PHYSICS_MIN_TURN_RADIUS_M, PHYSICS_MAX_CORNER_SPEED, PHYSICS_FWD_SPEED_MS, PHYSICS_TURN_SPEED_MS are all imported from deepracer_tools and passed to index.html template.
5. SSE HEADERS — confirm /stream returns Cache-Control: no-cache and X-Accel-Buffering: no.
6. HEARTBEAT — confirm /stream yields ': heartbeat\n\n' on 15s queue timeout.
7. STREAM BREAK — confirm /stream breaks after yielding a done or stopped event.
8. FLASK CONFIG — confirm app.run(debug=True, threaded=True, port=5000).
9. WARNINGS — confirm /plan uses warnings.catch_warnings(record=True) and returns warnings array.

Report any violations.
